phone._comment: Subscribe to this topic in the ntfy app. You get a push; reply to the topic and the agent reads it back. Use --channel phone, or set this as default_channel on headless boxes.

slack._comment: One-way (notify only). Slack incoming webhooks want a 'text' field, which is exactly the default body, so no 'body' template is needed.

discord._comment: One-way (notify only). Discord webhooks want a 'content' field, not 'text', so this body template is required. Placeholders: {title} {message}.

say._comment: Escape hatch: run any program. Placeholders: {message} {title} {default} {options}. notify uses the exit code; ask reads stdout; confirm treats exit 0 as approve and nonzero as deny.
